files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AiMediaPayload
files.Summary: Binary payload with MIME type metadata for multimodal AI content.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AiToolAttribute
files.Summary: Marks a -decorated interface or method for AI tool schema generation. The source generator will emit an OpenAI-compatible function-calling JSON schema.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AotCompatibilityAttribute
files.Summary: Marks an assembly as validated for NativeAOT compatibility.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AppBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Avalonia extensions for the Agibuild WebView.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AutoUpdateOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the auto-update service.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AutoUpdateService
files.Summary: Runtime implementation of . Coordinates the update lifecycle (check → download → verify → apply) via an and exposes bridge events for JS consumers.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AvaloniaWebDialog
files.Summary:
Production implementation of backed by an Avalonia containing a control. The WebView control handles all native platform adapter creation, NativeControlHost lifecycle, and attachment automatically.

Usage: 

var dialog = new AvaloniaWebDialog();
dialog.Title = "Sign In";
dialog.Show();
await dialog.NavigateAsync(new Uri("https://example.com"));

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.AvaloniaWebDialogFactory
files.Summary:
Production implementation of that creates instances backed by Avalonia Window + WebView.

Register via DI or instantiate directly: 

var factory = new AvaloniaWebDialogFactory();
using var dialog = factory.Create();
dialog.Show();
await dialog.NavigateAsync(new Uri("https://example.com"));

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeCallContext
files.Summary: Context object passed through the bridge middleware pipeline.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeCallDelegate
files.Summary: Delegate representing the next step in the middleware pipeline (or the terminal handler).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeCallDirection
files.Summary: Direction of a bridge call.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeCallPhase
files.Summary: Phase of a bridge call lifecycle.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeCallProfiler
files.Summary: An that collects per-method and per-service statistics for call counts, errors, and latency percentiles. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeDebugServer
files.Summary: Lightweight WebSocket server that streams IBridgeTracer events to external tools (e.g., VS Code extension). Opt-in via BridgeDebugServerOptions.Enabled. Localhost-only.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeDebugServerOptions
files.Summary: Options for the Bridge Debug Server (WebSocket streaming of bridge events).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeDevToolsEvent
files.Summary: Represents a single bridge call event captured for the DevTools panel.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeDevToolsOverlay
files.Summary:
An Avalonia panel that hosts the Bridge DevTools overlay, displaying real-time bridge call logs, payloads, latency metrics, and error details.

Place this in a alongside the main and call to wire it up: 

<Grid>
  <agw:WebView x:Name="WebView" />
  <agw:BridgeDevToolsOverlay x:Name="DevToolsOverlay"
    VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Height="300" IsVisible="False" />
</Grid>

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeDevToolsService
files.Summary: Provides the Bridge DevTools overlay for debugging bridge calls. Serves the overlay HTML and pushes events to the WebView in real-time.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeErrorCode
files.Summary: Specific bridge call error codes with actionable diagnostic information.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeErrorDiagnostic
files.Summary: Rich error diagnostic with error code, message, and optional actionable hint.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeEvent<T>
files.Summary:
Runtime implementation of that allows C# code to push events to JavaScript.

Declare properties as on the interface, and use in the implementation to emit events: 

private readonly BridgeEvent<Notification> _onNew = new();
public IBridgeEvent<Notification> OnNew => _onNew;
// Push: _onNew.Emit(new Notification(...));

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeEventCollector
files.Summary: Thread-safe bounded ring buffer that collects instances. When the buffer is full, the oldest events are dropped.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeImportProxy
files.Summary: implementation for interfaces. Routes every method call to the RPC service.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeOptions
files.Summary: Per-service options for .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgePluginExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering bridge plugins.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgePluginServiceDescriptor
files.Summary: Describes a single bridge service provided by a plugin. Use to create descriptors with compile-time type safety.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeProxyAttribute
files.Summary: Assembly-level attribute linking a interface to its source-generated proxy implementation class.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeRegistrationAttribute
files.Summary: Assembly-level attribute linking a interface to its source-generated implementation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.BridgeTelemetryTracer
files.Summary: An that auto-collects bridge call metrics via . Tracks latency on call end and errors on call error. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.CompositeBridgeTracer
files.Summary: An that holds multiple tracers and forwards each callback to all. Exceptions from one tracer are caught and do not prevent other tracers from receiving events. instances are filtered out and not included.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.CompositeTelemetryProvider
files.Summary: A telemetry provider that forwards all calls to multiple inner providers. Exceptions from one provider do not affect others.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ConsoleTelemetryProvider
files.Summary: Telemetry provider that writes events to stdout (useful for development/debugging). Serves as a reference implementation for custom providers.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ContentFilterAction
files.Summary: The action a content filter takes on content.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ContentFilterResult
files.Summary: Result of a content filter operation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DevToolsPanelTracer
files.Summary: An that records all bridge events into a for the DevTools debug overlay. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer so that logging/other tracing is preserved.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DragDropBridgeService
files.Summary: Bridge service implementation that exposes drag-and-drop events to JavaScript.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DragDropEffects
files.Summary: Drag-and-drop effect flags for native ↔ web interoperability.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DragDropPayload
files.Summary: Payload for drag-and-drop operations between native and web contexts.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DragEventArgs
files.Summary: Event args for drag enter/over events. Effect can be set by the handler.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.DropEventArgs
files.Summary: Event args for drop completion.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.FileDropInfo
files.Summary: Metadata for a file in a drag-drop payload.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.GlobalShortcutBinding
files.Summary: Binding definition for a global shortcut: a user-defined ID with a key + modifier combination.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.GlobalShortcutResult
files.Summary: Result of a global shortcut operation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.GlobalShortcutResultStatus
files.Summary: Outcome of a global shortcut registration or unregistration operation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.GlobalShortcutService
files.Summary: Manages OS-level global hotkey registration with policy governance and lifecycle management. Delegates actual OS calls to an .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.GlobalShortcutTriggeredEvent
files.Summary: Event payload pushed to JS when a registered global shortcut is triggered.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IAiContentFilter
files.Summary: Pluggable content filter for AI input/output safety. Implementations are composed into an ordered pipeline via DI.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IAutoUpdatePlatformProvider
files.Summary: Platform-specific provider for auto-update operations. Implement this interface to supply update mechanics for each target platform.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IAutoUpdateService
files.Summary: Provides application auto-update lifecycle: check, download, verify, and apply updates. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IAutoUpdateService>(impl).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeEvent<T>
files.Summary: Marker interface for typed event channels on interfaces. Properties of this type on a [JsExport] interface are automatically wired as push event channels from C# to JavaScript by the source generator.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeEventCollector
files.Summary: Collects bridge call events in a bounded buffer for DevTools consumption.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeMiddleware
files.Summary: ASP.NET Core–style middleware for intercepting bridge RPC calls (logging, auth, error transform, etc.).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgePlugin
files.Summary:
Marker interface for bridge plugins. Implementations provide a static manifest of bridge services that can be registered in one call via .

Uses C# static abstract members for NativeAOT-safe compile-time discovery. The implementing class is never instantiated — it acts purely as a manifest.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeService
files.Summary:
Type-safe bridge service for exposing C# services to JavaScript and importing JS services into C#.

Use with interfaces to register C# implementations callable from JS.

Use with interfaces to obtain a typed C# proxy that calls JS methods.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeServiceRegistration<T>
files.Summary: Implemented by source-generated registration classes for interfaces. Provides reflection-free handler registration, JS stub generation, and method metadata.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IBridgeTracer
files.Summary: Optional tracer for Bridge method calls. Implement this interface to observe all RPC traffic for debugging, performance monitoring, or visualization.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IConfigProvider
files.Summary: Provides remote configuration and feature flag values.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IDialogHost
files.Summary: Abstraction for the dialog window host (platform window management). Kept host-framework-neutral to enable unit testing with mocks.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IDragDropBridgeService
files.Summary: Bridge service that exposes drag-and-drop events to JavaScript. Events are delivered as streaming callbacks via bridge import proxies.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider
files.Summary: Platform abstraction for OS-level global hotkey registration. Each platform provides its own implementation (Windows RegisterHotKey, macOS CGEvent, etc.).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IGlobalShortcutService
files.Summary: Provides OS-level global hotkey registration, lifecycle management, and activation event dispatch. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IGlobalShortcutService>(impl).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IMauiWebViewHost
files.Summary: Contract for hosting an Agibuild.Fulora WebView in a .NET MAUI application.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IPlatformThemeProvider
files.Summary: Abstracts OS-specific theme detection. Implement per platform for accent color, high-contrast detection, and theme change notifications.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ISharedStateStore
files.Summary: Cross-WebView reactive key-value state store with last-writer-wins conflict resolution. All WebViews sharing the same store instance see a consistent view of state.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ISpaHostingWebView
files.Summary: Marks an implementation that can enable framework SPA hosting.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ITelemetryProvider
files.Summary: Provides telemetry and crash reporting capabilities.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IThemeService
files.Summary: Provides OS theme information and real-time theme change notifications. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IThemeService>(impl).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IWebViewMessageBus
files.Summary: Message bus for cross-WebView communication. Allows publishing and subscribing to topics across multiple WebView instances, with the host runtime acting as mediator.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IWindowChromeProvider
files.Summary: Abstracts platform-specific window chrome operations (transparency, metrics, appearance). Concrete implementations (e.g. Avalonia) add window tracking on the concrete type.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.IWindowShellService
files.Summary: Framework-level shell-window service contract. Provides snapshot, update, and stream access to the global shell-window state (theme, transparency, chrome metrics).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.JsExportAttribute
files.Summary: Marks an interface whose C# implementation is exposed to JavaScript. The Source Generator (or RuntimeBridgeService) registers RPC handlers for each method, making them callable from JS via window.agWebView.bridge.{ServiceName}.{methodName}().

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.JsImportAttribute
files.Summary: Marks an interface whose methods are implemented in JavaScript. The Source Generator (or RuntimeBridgeService) creates a C# proxy that forwards each call to JS via rpc.InvokeAsync("{ServiceName}.{methodName}", params).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.JsonFileConfigProvider
files.Summary: An that reads configuration from a local JSON file. Supports refresh to reload the file. Thread-safe.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.LoggingBridgeTracer
files.Summary: Default tracer that logs all bridge calls via . Attach to for structured call tracing.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.MauiWebViewHostOptions
files.Summary: Options for configuring a MAUI WebView host.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.MethodProfileStats
files.Summary: Aggregated statistics for a single bridge method.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.MockBridgeService
files.Summary:
A mock implementation of for unit testing. Allows testing ViewModels and services that depend on Bridge without a real WebView.

Deliverable 1.5: MockBridge for consumer unit testing.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.NativeOverlay.INativeOverlayProvider
files.Summary: Platform-specific provider for creating and managing native overlay windows above WebView.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.NullBridgeTracer
files.Summary: A no-op tracer that discards all events. Used when no tracing is configured.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.NullTelemetryProvider
files.Summary: A no-op telemetry provider that discards all events.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.OverlayHitTestResult
files.Summary: Result of hit-testing a point against the overlay.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.PluginManifest
files.Summary: Represents the fulora-plugin.json manifest embedded in Fulora plugin NuGet packages. Provides machine-readable metadata for compatibility checking and plugin discovery.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.RateLimit
files.Summary: Defines a sliding-window rate limit: at most calls per .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.RemoteConfigProvider
files.Summary: Config provider that fetches from a remote HTTP endpoint and merges with a local fallback. Remote values override local values.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ScriptResultHelper
files.Summary: Utility for normalizing JavaScript execution results returned by browser engines. WebView2's ExecuteScriptAsync returns JSON-encoded strings (e.g. "null" for null/undefined, ""hello"" for "hello"). This helper decodes such values to raw strings expected by the V1 adapter contract.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ServiceProfileStats
files.Summary: Aggregated statistics for a bridge service (all methods).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ServiceWorkerRegistrar
files.Summary: Generates and injects service worker registration and implementation scripts for offline support in WebView-hosted SPAs.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SharedStateStore
files.Summary: Thread-safe shared state store with last-writer-wins (LWW) conflict resolution. Each entry tracks a timestamp; stale writes are silently ignored.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider
files.Summary: Avalonia-based implementation of that binds tray and menu operations to Avalonia TrayIcon and NativeMenu controls. Non-tray/menu operations are delegated to an inner provider.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.AvaloniaThemeProvider
files.Summary: Avalonia-based that detects dark/light mode via and dispatches change events. Accent color and high-contrast are delegated to platform-specific detection.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.AvaloniaWindowChromeProvider
files.Summary: Avalonia-based that manages window transparency, custom chrome drag regions, and appearance for one or more tracked Avalonia windows.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkActivationEnvelope
files.Summary: Canonical deep-link activation envelope normalized from platform-specific payloads.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkActivationIngressResult
files.Summary: Result of attempting to ingest a deep-link activation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkActivationIngressStatus
files.Summary: Status of a deep-link activation ingress attempt.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkActivationSource
files.Summary: Source of a deep-link activation event.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkAdmissionDecision
files.Summary: Policy decision for deep-link activation admission.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkDiagnosticEventArgs
files.Summary: Structured diagnostic event for deep-link registration and activation lifecycle.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkDiagnosticEventType
files.Summary: Diagnostic event type for deep-link activation lifecycle.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkPlatformEntryDescriptor
files.Summary: Describes a platform's deep-link activation entry mapping.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkPlatformEntrypoint
files.Summary: Static helper for platform entrypoints to ingest deep-link activation into .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkPlatformSupport
files.Summary: Platform support status for deep-link native registration.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkRegistrationResult
files.Summary: Result of a deep-link route registration attempt.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkRegistrationService
files.Summary: Default implementation of . Provides route registration, URI normalization, policy admission, idempotency enforcement, and dispatch to .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkRegistrationStatus
files.Summary: Status of a deep-link registration validation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DeepLinkRouteDeclaration
files.Summary: Declaration of a supported deep-link scheme and route pattern for an app identity.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateCommandPolicy
files.Summary: Command policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateDevToolsPolicy
files.Summary: DevTools policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateDownloadPolicy
files.Summary: Download policy that delegates handling to a host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateMenuPruningPolicy
files.Summary: Menu pruning policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateNewWindowPolicy
files.Summary: New-window policy that delegates handling to a host-provided callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegatePermissionPolicy
files.Summary: Permission policy that delegates handling to a host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateSessionPermissionProfileResolver
files.Summary: Delegate-based session-permission profile resolver.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.DelegateSessionPolicy
files.Summary: Session policy that delegates resolution to a host callback.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.FallbackThemeProvider
files.Summary: Fallback that returns safe defaults. Used on platforms where OS theme APIs are unavailable (e.g., headless, unsupported Linux variants).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.GlobalShortcutPlatformProviderFactory
files.Summary: Factory selecting the correct for the current platform.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IDeepLinkAdmissionPolicy
files.Summary: Policy interface for deep-link activation admission.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IDeepLinkRegistrationService
files.Summary: Host-facing service for deep-link route registration and native activation ingress.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.ITrayIconResolver
files.Summary: Resolves a tray icon path to an Avalonia .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewDownloadPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for handling .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewHostCapabilityPolicy
files.Summary: Host capability authorization policy.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider
files.Summary: Host capability provider implementation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewNewWindowPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for handling in a host-controlled way.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewPermissionPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for handling .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewSessionPermissionProfileResolver
files.Summary: Resolver for session-permission profile.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewShellCommandPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for governing command execution in shell experience.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewShellDevToolsPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for governing DevTools operations in shell experience.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewShellMenuPruningPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for pruning menu model state in shell governance pipeline.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IWebViewShellSessionPolicy
files.Summary: Policy for resolving shell session scope.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.IsolatedSessionPolicy
files.Summary: Session policy that always resolves to an isolated scope.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.MenuInteractionEventArgs
files.Summary: Event args for menu item interaction events.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.NavigateInPlaceNewWindowPolicy
files.Summary: New-window policy that preserves the v1 fallback behavior (navigate in-place when unhandled).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.NullGlobalShortcutProvider
files.Summary: No-op provider for platforms that do not support global shortcuts (Wayland, mobile, etc.).

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.SharedSessionPolicy
files.Summary: Session policy that always resolves to a shared scope.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.SharpHookGlobalShortcutProvider
files.Summary: Cross-platform global shortcut provider using SharpHook (libuiohook). Supports Windows, macOS (requires Accessibility permission), and Linux X11. The hook is started lazily on first registration and stopped on last unregistration/dispose.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.ThemeService
files.Summary: Bridge service implementation that exposes OS theme information to JavaScript. Uses for OS-specific detection and for push-based theme change notifications.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.TrayInteractionEventArgs
files.Summary: Event args for tray interaction events.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewFileDialogResult
files.Summary: Result of file dialog operations.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityBridge
files.Summary: Runtime host capability bridge with policy-first deterministic execution semantics.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityBridgeOptions
files.Summary: Options for host capability bridge boundary validation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityCallOutcome
files.Summary: Deterministic outcome model for host capability calls.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<T>
files.Summary: Typed result envelope for host capability calls.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityDecision
files.Summary: Authorization decision for a capability request.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityDecisionKind
files.Summary: Authorization decision kind for a capability request.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityDiagnosticEventArgs
files.Summary: Structured diagnostic payload for a completed host capability call.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityDiagnosticExportRecord
files.Summary: Stable export payload for host capability diagnostics.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityOperation
files.Summary: Typed host capability operations available through the shell bridge.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewHostCapabilityRequestContext
files.Summary: Request context for host capability authorization.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewManagedWindowCreateContext
files.Summary: Input payload for creating a managed shell window.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleEventArgs
files.Summary: Lifecycle event payload for managed windows.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleState
files.Summary: Lifecycle states for runtime-managed windows.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewMenuItemModel
files.Summary: Typed menu item model.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewMenuModelRequest
files.Summary: Typed menu model payload for host app-shell integration.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewMenuPruningDecision
files.Summary: Decision returned by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewMenuPruningPolicyContext
files.Summary: Context for menu pruning policy evaluation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewNewWindowPolicyContext
files.Summary: Context for new-window policy evaluation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewNewWindowStrategy
files.Summary: Strategy result for handling a new-window request.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewNewWindowStrategyDecision
files.Summary: Strategy decision returned by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewNotificationRequest
files.Summary: Request payload for host notification.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewOpenFileDialogRequest
files.Summary: Request payload for open-file dialog.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewPermissionProfileDecision
files.Summary: Typed permission decision under profile governance.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSaveFileDialogRequest
files.Summary: Request payload for save-file dialog.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSessionPermissionProfile
files.Summary: Resolved profile model that governs session and permission behavior.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSessionPermissionProfileContext
files.Summary: Input context for resolving session-permission profiles.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSessionPermissionProfileDiagnosticEventArgs
files.Summary: Diagnostic payload for session-permission profile evaluation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellActivationCoordinator
files.Summary: Deterministic in-process single-instance activation coordinator.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellActivationForwardResult
files.Summary: Forward result for activation dispatch.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellActivationForwardStatus
files.Summary: Forward status for secondary-instance activation dispatch.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellActivationRegistration
files.Summary: Registration handle returned by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellActivationRequest
files.Summary: Activation request payload forwarded from secondary instance to current primary owner.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellCommandDecision
files.Summary: Decision returned by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellCommandPolicyContext
files.Summary: Context for shell command policy evaluation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellDevToolsAction
files.Summary: DevTools operation kinds governed by shell policy.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellDevToolsDecision
files.Summary: Decision returned by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellDevToolsPolicyContext
files.Summary: Context for DevTools policy evaluation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellExperience
files.Summary: Opt-in runtime helper that wires common host policies (new window, downloads, permissions) onto an instance.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellExperienceOptions
files.Summary: Options for . All features are opt-in.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellPolicyDomain
files.Summary: Shell policy execution domains.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellPolicyErrorEventArgs
files.Summary: Error payload raised when a shell policy handler fails.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellSessionContext
files.Summary: Input context for resolving shell session policy.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellSessionDecision
files.Summary: Session resolution result produced by .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewShellSessionScope
files.Summary: Session scope used by shell policy.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSystemAction
files.Summary: Supported typed system actions.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSystemActionRequest
files.Summary: Typed request payload for host system action execution.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSystemIntegrationEventKind
files.Summary: Typed system integration event kinds emitted from host to web pipeline.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest
files.Summary: Typed inbound system integration event payload.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WebViewTrayStateRequest
files.Summary: Typed tray state payload for host app-shell integration.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WindowChromeTrackingOptions
files.Summary: Options for tracking a window under the chrome provider.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.Shell.WindowShellService
files.Summary: Framework-level shell-window service. Manages global appearance settings (theme, transparency, chrome metrics) across all tracked windows. Designed as an app-level singleton shared across multiple WebViews via Bridge.Expose<IWindowShellService>().

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ShortcutKey
files.Summary: Virtual key codes for global shortcut registration. Subset of commonly used keys across all platforms.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ShortcutModifiers
files.Summary: Modifier key flags for global shortcut registration.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaAssetHotUpdateResult
files.Summary: Result for signed SPA asset package operations.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaAssetHotUpdateService
files.Summary: Signed package installer + activation/rollback orchestrator for SPA assets.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaBootstrapOptions
files.Summary: Options for WebViewBootstrapExtensions.BootstrapSpaAsync. Encapsulates dev/prod navigation, bridge service registration, and error handling.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaBootstrapProfileExceptionScope
files.Summary: Metadata that marks an explicit exception scope for profile-level customization. This metadata is consumed by governance and diagnostics to track approved escape-hatch usage.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaBootstrapProfileExtension
files.Summary: Represents an explicit profile extension hook applied during bridge configuration. Extensions are evaluated in declared order.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaBootstrapProfileOptions
files.Summary: Profile-level bootstrap options that wrap and add explicit extension hooks plus governance metadata.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaBootstrapProfileTeardown
files.Summary: Represents a lifecycle teardown callback owned by profile bootstrap. Teardowns execute in declaration order when the host adapter is destroyed.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaHostingExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring SPA hosting.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.SpaHostingOptions
files.Summary: Configures SPA hosting within the WebView. Supports serving embedded resources (production) or proxying to a dev server (development) via a custom app:// scheme.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.StateChangedEventArgs
files.Summary: Event arguments for state change notifications.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ThemeChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event payload pushed to JS when the OS theme changes.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.ThemeInfo
files.Summary: Snapshot of the current OS theme state.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.TransparencyEffectiveState
files.Summary: Effective transparency state as resolved by the platform provider.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.TransparencyLevel
files.Summary: Platform transparency composition levels.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.UpdateDownloadProgress
files.Summary: Progress information for an ongoing download.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.UpdateInfo
files.Summary: Describes an available application update.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.UpdateResult
files.Summary: Result of an update check or lifecycle operation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.UpdateStatus
files.Summary: Status of an auto-update operation.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.VelopackAutoUpdateProvider
files.Summary: Auto-update provider that works with a generic update feed URL. Compatible with Velopack-style releases.{channel}.json feeds and simple custom JSON feeds.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebAuthBroker
files.Summary:
Concrete implementation of that opens a to perform the OAuth authentication flow.

Flow: 1. Create an ephemeral WebDialog via . 2. Navigate to . 3. Listen for to detect the callback URI. 4. On match: close dialog, return with Success. 5. On user close: return UserCancel. 6. On timeout: return Timeout.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebAuthBrokerWithSemantics
files.Summary: Decorates an to enforce v1 baseline contract semantics.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebAuthCallbackMatcher
files.Summary: Helpers for matching web authentication callback URIs.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebDialog
files.Summary: Runtime implementation of . Wraps a and delegates window management to a .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebMessageBridgeOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for enabling the web message bridge.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebView
files.Summary:
An Avalonia control that embeds a platform-native WebView.

Usage in XAML: 

<agw:WebView Source="https://example.com" />

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewBootstrapExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for bootstrapping SPA navigation and bridge registration on .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewCore
files.Summary: Core runtime implementation of over a platform adapter.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewEnvironment
files.Summary:
Global configuration for the Agibuild WebView components.

Call once at application startup so that all WebView controls automatically receive shared services.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewEnvironmentOptions
files.Summary: Default implementation of .

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewMessage
files.Summary: A message delivered through the WebView message bus.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewMessageBus
files.Summary: Thread-safe implementation of for cross-WebView communication. Uses for topic→subscribers and dispatches to all matching handlers.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewOverlayHost
files.Summary: Manages a transparent companion window for rendering Avalonia controls above a WebView. Uses a real borderless Avalonia as a child of the parent window, positioned to exactly cover the WebView bounds.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary:
Extension methods for registering Avalonia WebDialog and WebAuthBroker services.

Call services.AddWebViewDialogServices() to register:

  • → (singleton)
  • → (transient)

Note: Call services.AddWebView() first if you also need the base factory and dispatcher registrations.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewShortcutAction
files.Summary: Routed action payload for a keyboard shortcut.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewShortcutActionKind
files.Summary: Action type routed from a keyboard shortcut.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewShortcutBinding
files.Summary: Shortcut binding from key + modifiers to a routed action.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WebViewShortcutRouter
files.Summary: Routes keyboard shortcuts to WebView command and DevTools actions. When a is provided, window-local bindings take priority over global shortcuts for the same key combination.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowAppearanceRequest
files.Summary: Request payload for applying window appearance changes.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowChromeMetrics
files.Summary: Host window chrome metrics relevant for web layout.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowSafeInsets
files.Summary: Insets required by host chrome/safe-area layout.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowShellCapabilities
files.Summary: Host capabilities and effective shell-window composition state.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowShellSettings
files.Summary: Requested shell-window settings from web content.

files.Title: Agibuild.Fulora.WindowShellState
files.Summary: Applied shell-window state returned to web content.
